startPoint.en: Talk to the High Priest of Icthlarin in the southern temple of Sophanem.
startPoint.es: Habla con el High Priest of Icthlarin en el templo sur de Sophanem.

items.name: Light sources
items.display: Any light source (recommended Seer's headband or bullseye lantern, though a torch can be obtained during quest)

recommended.name: Pharaoh's sceptre
recommended.display: Pharaoh's sceptre; desert, Keldagrim, Prifddinas or master camouflage outfit; or Sophanem Slayer Dungeon teleport for faster teleportation

recommended.name: Prayer
recommended.display: 43 Prayer and one or two prayer potions

recommended.name: Energy potion
recommended.display: A few energy potions or mint cakes

recommended.name: Amulet of glory
recommended.display: An amulet of glory, Broomstick, or the Al Kharid lodestone teleport

recommended.name: Ring of life
recommended.display: One click teleportation and/or ring of life (in case you fall into the scarab traps)

rewards.display: 2 × 7,000 experience lamp in a choice of Attack, Strength, Defence, Constitution, Ranged, Magic or Summoning (Summoning must be level 30 or higher)

children.display: If you accidentally destroy the experience lamp, another may be obtained by seeing the High Priest

rewards.name: Keris
rewards.display: Keris, a dagger which is very effective against Kalphites and Scarabs

rewards.name: Sophanem
rewards.display: Access to Sophanem's bank under the Temple of Lesser Deities in the north-east corner (useful for Pyramid Plunder)

rewards.name: Coenus
rewards.display: Coenus will allow a one-way passage from Menaphos to Sophanem.

text.en: Talk to the High Priest in Sophanem , then after the cutscene, .
text.es: Habla con el High Priest en Sophanem, y tras la escena,.

chatOptions: 5 Is there any way into Menaphos from below?

text.en: Talk to Jex in front of the building in the north-east corner of the city.
text.es: Habla con Jex frente al edificio de la esquina noreste de la ciudad.

text.en: Climb down the ladder in the church east of Jex, and down again in the second trapdoor.
text.es: Baja por la escalera de la iglesia al este de Jex, y vuelve a bajar por la segunda trampilla.

text.en: You can speak to one of the Sophanem Guards here if you still need a torch, they will sell you one for 200 coins.
text.es: Puedes hablar con uno de los Sophanem Guards aquí si aún necesitas una antorcha, te venderán una por 200 monedas.

text.en: Protect from magic prayers and auto-retaliate off is recommended.
text.es: Se recomienda usar la Oración de protección contra magia y desactivar el contraataque automático.

text.en: Follow the red line through the maze (pictured right). You can avoid traps by clicking on them, or walking around them where appropriate.
text.es: Sigue la línea roja a través del laberinto (imagen a la derecha). Puedes evitar las trampas haciendo clic en ellas, o rodeándolas cuando sea posible.

text.en: You can use the high contrast mode to make the traps easier to spot, except for the pitfalls.
text.es: Puedes usar el modo de alto contraste para detectar las trampas más fácilmente, excepto los pozos.

text.en: For high level players you can take the ladder in the north, marked (2) on the map.
text.es: Los jugadores de nivel alto pueden usar la escalera del norte, marcada con (2) en el mapa.

text.en: Then run south west to ladder marked (6) to skip most of the maze.
text.es: Luego corre hacia el suroeste hasta la escalera marcada con (6) para saltarte la mayor parte del laberinto.

text.en: Run east while avoiding the traps, north, and then west again and climb down the ladder.
text.es: Corre hacia el este evitando las trampas, luego al norte, y otra vez al oeste, y baja por la escalera.

text.en: Run towards the larger room.
text.es: Corre hacia la sala más grande.

text.en: Search Kaleef's body and read the parchment.
text.es: Registra el cuerpo de Kaleef y lee el pergamino.

text.en: Talk to Maisa to the west.
text.es: Habla con Maisa al oeste.

text.en: Talk to Osman inside the Al Kharid palace.
text.es: Habla con Osman dentro del palacio de Al Kharid.

chatOptions: 2 I want to talk to you about Sophanem.
3 It would drive a wedge between the Menaphite cities.

text.en: Prepare to fight a level 86 foe - a giant scarab.
text.es: Prepárate para luchar contra un enemigo de nivel 86: un giant scarab.

text.en: Talk to Osman outside the northern Sophanem gate.
text.es: Habla con Osman fuera de la puerta norte de Sophanem.

chatOptions: 3 I know of a secret entrance to the north.

text.en: Run all the way back to Kaleef's body.
text.es: Corre de vuelta hasta el cuerpo de Kaleef.

text.en: Kill the giant scarab and take the Keris.
text.es: Mata al giant scarab y coge el Keris.

text.en: Optional: Players with level 50 Attack may head back up the ladder and kill a scarab mage or locust rider with the Keris dagger. This completes the Ludikeris achievement.
text.es: Opcional: los jugadores con nivel 50 de Ataque pueden volver a subir por la escalera y matar a un scarab mage o un locust rider con la daga Keris. Esto completa el logro Ludikeris.

text.en: Return to Sophanem and talk to the High Priest (there is no shortcut back, teleporting is possible).
text.es: Vuelve a Sophanem y habla con el High Priest (no hay atajo de regreso, es posible teletransportarse).

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
